name: Mohammed Irfan A
professional_focus: Deeply focused on Artificial Intelligence Engineering, Computer Vision, Generative AI, and building intelligent full-stack systems (like RAG architectures and multi-step reasoning agents) that bridge theoretical AI with practical, real-world applications.

education.current: 7th Semester B.Tech in Computer Science Engineering (Specialization in AI & ML) at Nehru College of Engineering and Research Centre (NCERC), Thrissur, Kerala
education.previous: Diploma in Computer Engineering from St. Mary's Polytechnic College

key_projects.title: LinkedAgent
key_projects.details: An AI-powered LinkedIn post intelligence agent built for the Agents League Hackathon 2026 (Microsoft Foundry IQ Track). Transforms notes into optimized posts using a 10-step reasoning chain powered by LLaMA 3.3 70B via Groq.

key_projects.title: BizBrain
key_projects.details: An AI-powered business intelligence agent that acts as a strategic brain-for-hire. Digests business data and generates psychology-backed strategies using a 6-pillar reasoning engine and LLaMA 3.3 70B.

key_projects.title: Kerala Career Compass
key_projects.details: A bilingual AI-powered career guidance platform for Kerala students. Implements a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architecture streaming institutional data out of MongoDB into Llama 3.1.

key_projects.title: NCERC Campus Fleet Management System
key_projects.details: An automated campus gate logging system using YOLOv12 for vehicle detection, an optimized YOLO model for license plates, and EasyOCR for text parsing. Employs a Flask backend, MongoDB, Socket.IO, and real-time Telegram alerts.
key_projects.team: Mohammed Irfan A, Salvin Sunny, Bhavya Biju, Diya Dinen

key_projects.title: Picto Pro
key_projects.details: A Generative AI application built for educators that converts text prompts and images into educational videos using a fully automated Python multimedia pipeline.
